steps.title: Track the frequency contrast
steps.content: The passage says it was relatively rare for Underground Railroad supporters to hide their antislavery views. The next sentence says they were vocal abolitionists like Greene, so the transition must signal the more common pattern.

steps.title: Reject weaker links
steps.content: Choice A says the behavior is appropriate but not frequent. Choice B signals concession, which is not the relationship. Choice D signals a single example, but the sentence makes a general frequency claim. The answer is C.
